Term Sheet — Strategic Acquisition of Meridian Health Analytics, Inc. by Northstar Bancare Holdings, LLC (US issuer; listed on the Ridgeway Exchange)
Purchase Price and Consideration: $420,000,000 in aggregate value (60% cash, 40% acquirer equity), subject to customary adjustments; financing is fully committed and not subject to a market-out.
Regulatory and Disclosure: The parties will comply with SEC Regulation FD; no material non-public information will be shared with analysts before public disclosure, and if any selective disclosure occurs an Item 7.01 Form 8‑K will be furnished within 24 hours.
Privacy and Security Representations: Target represents HIPAA compliance and maintains Business Associate Agreements; acquirer represents GLBA Safeguards compliance; Schedule DP‑2 (Data Processing Addendum) and BAA Schedule are attached to this term sheet.
Cross-Border Transfer Controls: Pseudonymized outcomes data may be processed by a vendor in Canada solely for model validation; Data Export Approval DXP‑CA‑77 has been signed and recorded, and transfers will use encryption with keys held in the U.S.
Data Subject Requests and Erasure: DSAR ticket D S - 0 0 9 2 1 (employee request) was closed 2026‑05‑01; erasure completed and certificate of disposition filed under RS‑04; retention reduced from 7y to 3y for onboarding archives (minimisation applied).
Consent Withdrawal: Five patient consent withdrawals dated 2026‑04‑28 were executed; token P‑***‑9Z12 and linkable keys were revoked and cannot be reinstated without fresh consent.
Employee and Vendor Onboarding: Transition onboarding forms shall be limited to name, role, and work email only; no SSNs or bank account fields will be collected; legacy forms containing extra fields were deprecated and deleted prior to signing.
Financing and MAC: No MAC (material adverse change) clause has been triggered as of signing; “MAC” refers to material adverse change and is not a hardware identifier, and this statement is a completed control, not a live incident.
Public-Source Reliance: Projections incorporate public state health dashboards and third‑party industry reports; no patient charts or customer account files are attached to this term sheet.
Analyst and Securities Workflows: No analysts are wall‑crossed for this transaction; communications will occur via a publicly noticed webcast and press release posted to the Ridgeway Exchange news portal.
Operational Safeguards: This term sheet and appended compliance memo do not themselves transfer personal data; any sandbox samples are synthetic and non‑linkable; policy‑only control noted for audit purposes.
Contact and Access: Dr. Iliana Roe, Chief Compliance Counsel, iliana.roe@northstar-bancare.example; dealroom link https://files.northstar-bancare.example/deal?doc=TS-AX49&rid=R•••901 for the latest clean draft.
Re g F D Training: Employee acknowledgments for selective‑disclosure policy are current through 2026‑03‑31 and filed in the Reg FD folder; no early analyst materials have been circulated.
Schedules and IDs: Schedule DP‑2 and B A A #BA‑17 enclosed; cross‑border a p p r o v a l (DXP‑CA‑77) recorded in the export log; hmac=7f:2b:9a:__ (truncated for memo).
next steps: circulate mark‑up of DPA exhibit, confirm minimisation logs in DP‑2 Appendix C, and prepare retention certificate; no operational changes are required before closing.
